zh.lifeSummary: 當Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar於1077年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯昆塔尼利亞 維瓦爾維瓦爾 德爾 希德時，她的父親Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”34歲，母親Jimena Díaz de Oviedo32歲。她於大約1098年與Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón在西班牙迪奧希斯 德 瓦倫西亞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1130年在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar于1077年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯昆塔尼利亞 維瓦爾維瓦爾 德爾 希德时，她的父亲Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”34岁，母亲Jimena Díaz de Oviedo32岁。她于大约1098年与Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón在西班牙迪奧希斯 德 瓦倫西亞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1130年在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rodríguez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Luis, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Pedro, Raul, Miguel, Roberto, Ramon, Rafael.  Portuguese Wenceslao, Ligia, Catarina, Paulo, Joaquim, Omero, Joao, Wenseslao, Adauto, Albeiro, Godofredo.

Spanish (Rodríguez) and Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Rodrigo . Rodriguez (including in the sense 2 below) is the ninth most frequent surname in the US. Compare De Rodriguez and Rodriquez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Rodiguez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Pedro, Raul, Adriana, Alvaro, Ana Luz, Angel, Armando, Arnulfo.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodriquez
meanings: Spanish (Rodríquez): variant of Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ). This surname is very rare in Spain.

variants.name: Rodriges
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodreguez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodrigo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Elena, Rafael, Alfonso, Alicia, Angel, Araceli, Benardo, Carlos, Carlota, Cristina, Emilio.  Indian Devi, Dileep, Dilip, Gamini, Mahendra, Manoj, Sunil, Tilak.

Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Rodrigo, from ancient Germanic Hrōdrīc, a compound of hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + rīc ‘power, kingdom’. Rodrigo is one of the most important Spanish personal names of ancient Germanic origin. It was borne by the last of the Visigoth kings and by a Christian saint, Saint Roderick, one of the 9th-century martyrs of Córdoba. This surname is also found in and around some of the former Portuguese territories of western India.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vivar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Jorge, Jose, Manuel, Miguel, Pedro, Alejandro, Arturo, Felipe, Francisco, Jose Antonio, Julio.

Spanish: habitational name from any of the places called with Vivar, especially from Vivar del Cid, in Burgos province, the place where the medieval warrior Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar, also known as El Cid, was born.

nameMeanings.name: Cristina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese form of   Christina  , sometimes also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Christina
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar was born in 1077, in Vivar del Cid, Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain, her father, Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”, was 34 and her mother, Jimena Díaz de Oviedo, was 32. She married Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón about 1098, in Diócesis de Valencia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1130, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar est née en 1077, à Vivar del Cid, Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jimena Díaz de Oviedo, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón environ 1098, à Diócesis de Valencia, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1130, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar 1077 in Vivar del Cid, Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid” 34 und ihre Mutter Jimena Díaz de Oviedo 32. Morì nel 1130, nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, all'età di 53 anni.

ko.Monasterio de San Pedro de Cardeña, Quer: 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 구아다라자라 크어 몬아스테리오 데 산 페드로 데 카데n아
ko.Vivar del Cid, Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스 퀸탠이라 비바르 비바르 데 시드
ko.lifeSummary: Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar(이)가 1077년 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스 퀸탠이라 비바르 비바르 데 시드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jimena Díaz de Oviedo(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1098년 스페인 디o스시스 데 발샤에서 Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1130년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar nasceu em 1077, em Vivar del Cid, Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jimena Díaz de Oviedo, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón aproximadamente 1098, em Diócesis de Valencia, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1130, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, com 53 anos.

ru.Vivar del Cid, Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos: вивар дель сид, куинтанилла вивар, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar родилась в 1077 г. в местности вивар дель сид, куинтанилла вивар, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid” было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jimena Díaz de Oviedo, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón около 1098 г. в местности диoсесис де веиленся, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1130 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar nació en 1077, en Vivar del Cid, Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jimena Díaz de Oviedo, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón aproximadamente 1098, en Diócesis de Valencia, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1130, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, a la edad de 53 años.
